content: The official Art-Net 4 protocol is release 1.4, document revision 1.4 dated 2025-10-23; Art-Net uses UDP port 0x1936. Go Art-Net libraries are small and incomplete or lightly adopted, so a production v1 should implement the narrow ArtDmx and ArtPoll codec over net.UDPConn and verify it against the official specification and packet captures.
